ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, OR( CONTAINS(Profile.Name ,"Contract Manager"), CONTAINS(Profile.Name ,"Force.com - App Subscription User"), CONTAINS(Profile.Name ,"Marketing User"), CONTAINS(Profile.Name ,"Read Only"), CONTAINS(Profile.Name ,"Solution Manager"), CONTAINS(Profile.Name ,"Standard User") ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please do not assign a user to a Salesforce Standard CRM Profile
